summary: Iteration 7: Frontend-only testing of SiteConfiguration component and Quick Capture bar sync. All 10 requested features verified working correctly. The main bug fix (localConfig.autoSync undefined causing early return) has been resolved - sites now properly sync from Quick Capture to Sizing tab.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>' - nested button in AccordionTrigger with Switch component. This is a React hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: Quick Capture bar - DCs displayed with KW values (DCs: 3 KW: 49)
Quick Capture bar - Sites displayed with KW values (Sites: 1 KW: 0)
Sizing tab - SiteConfiguration component renders correctly
Site auto-sync - Sites from Quick Capture appear in Sizing table (3 DCs + 1 Site = 4 Total Sites)
IP calculation - IPs calculated as KW × multiplier (25 × 2.5 = 63, 24 × 2.5 = 60)
Site role assignment - First DC is GM, subsequent DCs are GMC (verified: test=GM, test=GMC, New DC Test=GMC)
Add manual site button - Creates new site in table with default 1000 IPs
Site name editing - Site names can be changed via input fields
Site role dropdown - Role can be changed (Grid Master, Grid Master Candidate, DNS Only, DHCP Only, DNS + DHCP)
SmartFill tab - AI-powered form filling feature accessible (Meeting Notes + Analyze with AI + Context Summaries)
Version Control tab - Auto-save (0/10) and Named Revisions (0/5) features visible with Refresh and Clear All Data buttons
Tokens tab - Security and UDDI calculator sections accessible
6 tabs render correctly - Discovery, Sizing, Tokens, SmartFill, Import, Versions
Platform badges - NIOS, UDDI, Security, Asset Insights toggleable
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Nested button warning in AccordionTrigger with Switch component - consider restructuring to avoid button-in-button nesting
seed_data_creation: Used existing test customer 'Test Customer Frontend' with 2 DCs (test: KW 25, test: KW 24) and 1 Site (test: KW 0). Added 'New DC Test' during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SiteConfiguration component bug fix verified working. The fix addressed localConfig.autoSync being undefined which caused early return. Now uses proper memoization with useRef to prevent infinite loops when calling onChange. Quick Capture bar syncs DCs and Sites to Sizing tab correctly. First DC gets GM role, subsequent DCs get GMC role, Sites get DNS+DHCP role. IP calculation: KW × multiplier (default 2.5). Manual sites can be added with 'Add Site Manually' button.

quick_capture_bar.kw_input: working for both DCs and Sites

sizing_tab.add_manual_site: working - creates site with 1000 IPs default

bug_fix_verification.issue: localConfig.autoSync was undefined causing early return in SiteConfiguration
bug_fix_verification.fix: Uses proper memoization with useRef to prevent infinite loops when calling onChange
